We earn a small commission when you buy through them, at no extra cost to you. As an Amazon Associate we earn from qualifying purchases. See our ",["$","$L3",null,{"href":"/disclaimer","className":"text-orange-600 dark:text-orange-400 hover:underline","children":"disclaimer"}]," for details."]}],["$","div",null,{"className":"prose","children":[["$","h2","0",{"id":"why-a-chair-mat-matters","children":"Why a Chair Mat Matters"}],["$","p","1",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"Rolling an office chair on carpet or hardwood without a mat creates two problems. On carpet: you fight the resistance with every movement, adding low-level physical effort to every repositioning. On hardwood: the chair casters scratch the floor and roll unpredictably."}}],"$L9","$La","$Lb","$Lc","$Ld","$Le","$Lf","$L10","$L11","$L12","$L13","$L14","$L15","$L16","$L17","$L18","$L19","$L1a","$L1b","$L1c","$L1d","$L1e","$L1f","$L20","$L21"]}],"$L22","$L23","$L24"]}],"$L25"]}]]}]
7:["$","script","script-0",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/0wu484j-81s3l.js","async":true}]
8:["$","$L26",null,{"children":["$","$27",null,{"name":"Next.MetadataOutlet","children":"$@28"}]}]
9:["$","p","2",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"A chair mat solves both: smooth, consistent rolling with zero resistance, floor protection, and — on carpet — a stable surface that prevents the chair from sinking and tilting."}}]
a:["$","p","3",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"The ergonomic benefit is real. Effortless chair movement encourages you to adjust your position throughout the day — which reduces the static muscle tension that causes back pain during long work sessions."}}]
b:["$","h2","4",{"id":"hardwood-vs-carpet-different-requirements","children":"Hardwood vs. Carpet: Different Requirements"}]
c:["$","p","5",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<strong>Hard floors</strong> (hardwood, tile, vinyl): Need a mat that stays in place without adhesive, provides a smooth surface for rolling, and protects the finish. Avoid mats with spikes on the underside — these are designed for carpet and will scratch hard floors."}}]
d:["$","p","6",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<strong>Carpet</strong>: Need a mat with grippers on the underside to prevent sliding. The thicker the carpet pile, the more important this is. Check that the mat is rated for the carpet thickness."}}]
e:["$","p","7",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<strong>Low-pile carpet</strong> (most office carpet): Standard chair mats work well."}}]
f:["$","p","8",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<strong>High-pile or plush carpet</strong>: Requires a thicker, heavier mat with deeper grippers to stay stable."}}]
10:["$","h2","9",{"id":"materials","children":"Materials"}]
11:["$","p","10",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<strong>Polycarbonate</strong>: The clearest, hardest, and most durable plastic option. Scratch-resistant, supports heavy chairs without deforming, and maintains clarity over years. The best material for most setups."}}]
12:["$","p","11",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<strong>PVC</strong>: Less expensive than polycarbonate, less durable. Clouds over time, can crack in cold environments, and deforms under sustained heavy loads. Adequate for light use but not for all-day sitting."}}]
13:["$","p","12",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<strong>Glass</strong>: The premium option. Scratch-proof, completely transparent, and effectively permanent. Heavy and expensive but the best-looking option for visible home office setups."}}]
14:["$","p","13",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<strong>Bamboo/Cork</strong>: Sustainable materials that work well on hard floors. Look good but not suitable for carpet use."}}]
15:["$","h2","14",{"id":"size-guide","children":"Size Guide"}]
16:["$","p","15",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"Standard chair mats are 90×120 cm — adequate for a fixed-position setup. For larger desks where you roll significantly, a 120×150 cm mat is better. Measure your rolling distance in all directions and add 30 cm."}}]
17:["$","h2","16",{"id":"best-chair-mats-in-2026","children":"Best Chair Mats in 2026"}]
18:["$","h3","17",{"id":"best-overall-gorilla-grip-polycarbonate-chair-mat-60","children":"Best Overall: Gorilla Grip Polycarbonate Chair Mat (~£60)"}]
19:["$","p","18",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"Thick polycarbonate, clear, scratch-resistant, and available in multiple sizes for both hard floors and carpet. One of the few budget mats that does not deform under sustained load."}}]
1a:["$","h3","19",{"id":"best-for-hard-floors-lorell-polycarbonate-chair-mat-80","children":"Best for Hard Floors: Lorell Polycarbonate Chair Mat (~£80)"}]
1b:["$","p","20",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"Bevelled edges prevent tripping, ultra-clear finish, and a surface that rolls more smoothly than most carpet mats. The correct choice if your floor finish matters."}}]
1c:["$","h3","21",{"id":"best-for-deep-carpet-amazonbasics-polycarbonate-office-chair-mat-55","children":"Best for Deep Carpet: AmazonBasics Polycarbonate Office Chair Mat (~£55)"}]
1d:["$","p","22",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"Longer gripper studs specifically designed for high-pile carpet. Stays completely still under the chair without adhesive."}}]
1e:["$","h3","23",{"id":"best-premium-vitrazza-glass-office-chair-mat-250","children":"Best Premium: Vitrazza Glass Office Chair Mat (~£250)"}]
1f:["$","p","24",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"Tempered glass, scratch-proof forever, and looks completely different from plastic alternatives. Heavy (14 kg for the standard size) and expensive but the most durable and visually clean option available."}}]
20:["$","h3","25",{"id":"best-budget-transparentno-chair-mat-30","children":"Best Budget: Transparentno Chair Mat (~£30)"}]
21:["$","p","26",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"PVC, basic, and adequate for light to medium use on hard floors. Not for heavy chairs or extended daily use, but sufficient as a starting point."}}]
